input: How do I decompose a complex goal into subtasks that auto-complete the parent when done?
I need a task queue where critical tasks always run before low-priority ones, but FIFO within the same tier.
How do I gate task submission based on system health so degraded systems stop accepting work?
Design an immutable task record system where updates create new instances instead of mutating.
How should failure propagate from a subtask up to its parent task?
